seoDescription: Review acceptable use rules for API traffic, content safety, and lawful operation on dryAPI.

elements.text: This policy defines prohibited activity, abuse controls, and required safeguards for production workloads.

hero.heading: Acceptable Use Policy
hero.body: Use dryAPI for lawful, compliant workloads and follow controls that protect the platform and its users.

sections.title: Prohibited Activity
sections.body: We prohibit unlawful use, abuse patterns, and attempts to bypass platform safeguards.

cards.title: Abuse and Fraud
cards.description: Do not use the API for fraud, account takeover attempts, or harmful automation.

cards.title: Safety Evasion
cards.description: Do not circumvent moderation, auth, or rate-limit controls on any endpoint.

cards.title: Unauthorized Access
cards.description: Do not probe, scan, or attempt unauthorized access to internal systems.

sections.title: Operational Responsibilities
sections.body: Customers are responsible for securing credentials and monitoring usage within their organizations.

cards.title: Credential Management
cards.description: Protect API keys and rotate credentials according to internal security standards.

cards.title: Usage Monitoring
cards.description: Track request activity, billing signals, and anomalies to reduce operational risk.

cards.title: Policy Escalation
cards.description: Contact us if you need guidance on specific compliance boundaries.

contactPanel.heading: Need an acceptable-use review?
contactPanel.body: We can help security and legal teams validate policy alignment for new deployments.
contactPanel.responseTime: Policy guidance available within one business day
